title: poset_phase v2.1.0: Action-Weighted Poset Ensemble Analysis — Prediction A Manuscript Refinements
description: Exact numerical framework for studying geometric phase transitions in finite partially ordered sets (posets). v2.1.0 refines Prediction A manuscript: claim calibration ('systematic' replaces 'unconditional'), expanded seed sensitivity (N=68+72, 42/42 wins), two-tier K=8/K=4 sampling design, g_mcon multi-estimator consistency penalty, Conclusion section, and full MDPI/standard manuscript sync. Includes code for 4D Lorentzian family generation, dimension scan experiments (N=20–72), seed sensitivity analysis, geometric ablation, wcon sensitivity scan, and two complete LaTeX manuscripts.
notes: This software accompanies two manuscripts: (1) 'Bounded Geometric Phase Transition in Finite Causal Posets with Exact Entropy' (companion paper), and (2) 'Dimension-Agnostic Geometric Dominance in Finite Causal Posets' (Prediction A). AI tools (Claude, Anthropic) assisted with code development and analysis.
